title: React Bento Grid Component

statement.markdown:
## React Bento Grid Component with Glow spotlight Effect

Build a beautiful Bento Grid container styling layout cards of differing column spans. Add a cursor spotlight glow effect tracking the user's cursor.

### Requirements:
1. **Spotlight Tracking**: On mouse-move over each card, calculate mouse position relative to the card client boundaries. Dynamically update CSS custom variables (`--mouse-x` and `--mouse-y` in pixels).
2. **Radial Gradient Glow**: Card designs must include an absolute gradient layer styled with a radial gradient centered at the mouse coordinates:
   `radial-gradient(600px circle at var(--mouse-x) var(--mouse-y), rgba(120, 119, 198, 0.1), transparent 40%)`.
3. **Grid Layout**: Structure items in a multi-span Bento layout (combining standard 1-col items, large 2-col items, and full 3-col grids) using Tailwind CSS.

constraints: Must utilize React state and canvas lifecycle hooks

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive mouse tracking, scroll animations, or canvas draw loops work perfectly.
Verify clean React hook cleanups (setInterval, requestAnimationFrame, listeners) on component unmount.
